_note: Hand-authored stage ladder (CC-09). Bands tile weight_lbs; current rung resolves from real weight.

stage_ladder.headline: Get a real baseline panel.
stage_ladder.read_of_him: Before I can track anything, I need a clean baseline. At this stage the job is simply getting the bloodwork done.
stage_ladder.plan: Establish the baseline panel and flag anything urgent; everything downstream measures against this.
stage_ladder.graduation_gate: A complete baseline panel with no urgent flags unlocks the 'trends' rung.

stage_ladder.headline: Watch the markers move with the weight.
stage_ladder.read_of_him: Weight is coming down, and the metabolic markers should follow. Now I track direction, not just snapshots.
stage_ladder.plan: Re-panel on a sensible cadence and confirm the markers are moving the right way as weight drops.
stage_ladder.graduation_gate: Key markers trending into healthy ranges across re-panels unlocks 'optimization'.

stage_ladder.headline: Tighten the panel.
stage_ladder.read_of_him: The big risks are handled. Now we fine-tune toward genuinely optimal, not just normal.
cares_most: markers in optimal (not just normal) ranges
stage_ladder.plan: Push the high-leverage markers toward optimal with diet, training, and evidence-based supplements.
stage_ladder.graduation_gate: A broadly optimal panel sustained across re-tests unlocks 'longevity'.

stage_ladder.headline: Defend the gains in the blood.
stage_ladder.read_of_him: The panel looks strong. The job is keeping it that way and watching the long-horizon markers.
stage_ladder.plan: Maintain the cadence, keep the markers optimal, and watch for anything drifting early.
